attacks.name: Knuckle Blast
attacks.text: If you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: Its hard pincers are well suited to both offense and defense. Fights between two Crabrawler are like boxing matches.

name: Groudon ★
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Critical Collection
attacks.text: Count the number of Prize cards your opponent has taken. Search your discard pile for up to that many Fighting Energy cards and attach them to Groudon Star.

attacks.name: Ground Slash
attacks.text: Discard a Fighting Energy card attached to Groudon Star.

name: Gyarados Spirit Link
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Gyarados-EX.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Alolan Exeggutor

attacks.name: Paradise Draw
attacks.text: You may discard any number of cards from your hand. Then, draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Egg Splat
attacks.text: Discard any number of Exeggcute from your hand. This attack does 60 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

flavorText: Exeggutor is the pride of the Alolan people. Its image is carved into historical buildings and murals.

name: Flying Pikachu

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Flying Pikachu during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: By learning how to fly, Pikachu overcame its weakness to Fighting Pokémon.

name: Minccino

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: They great one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

name: Growlithe

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to Growlithe.

flavorText: A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.

name: Oddish

attacks.name: Poisonpowder
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It often plants its root feet in the ground during the day and sows seeds as it walks about at night.

name: Loudred

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: The shock waves from its cries can tip over trucks. It stamps its feet to power up.

name: Blaine's Gamble
rules: Discard any number of other cards from your hand, then flip a coin. If heads, draw twice that many cards.

name: Diancie

attacks.name: Sparkle
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Diamond Storm
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from each of your Fairy Pokémon.

flavorText: Open the magic door and a dream-colored party will start again today. I'll teach you the secret password.

name: Pokémon Center
rules: Remove all damage counters from all of your own Pokémon with damage counters on them, then discard all Energy cards attached to those Pokémon.

name: Steel Shelter
rules: Each Metal Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) can't be affected by any Special Conditions. (Remove any Special Conditions affecting those Pokémon.)
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Kyogre ★
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Critical Collection
attacks.text: Count the number of Prize cards your opponent has taken. Search your discard pile for up to that many Water Energy cards and attach them to Kyogre Star.

attacks.name: Sheer Cold
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, each Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

name: Onix
flavorText: It usually lives underground. It searches for food while boring its way through the ground at 50 miles per hour.

name: Reshiram

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.text: Does 10 more for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.text: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

name: Professor Sycamore
rules: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Lopunny

attacks.name: Healing Melody
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, heal 60 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Kick Away
attacks.text: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Extremely cautious, it quickly bounds off when it senses danger.

name: Dratini

attacks.name: Dragon Rage
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It's still weak, so it lurks on the floor of bodies of water, eating whatever food sinks down and living a quiet life.

name: Energy Retrieval
rules: Trade 1 of the other cards in your hand for up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile.

name: Tool Retriever
rules: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tool cards attached to your Pokémon and put them into your hand.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Teddiursa

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.text: Remove all Special Conditions and 2 damage counters from Teddiursa. Teddiursa is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Sweet Palm
attacks.text: Before doing damage, remove 1 damage counter from the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: It lets honey soak into its paws so it can lick them all the time. Every sets of paws tastes unique.

name: Night Maintenance
rules: Search your discard pile for up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon and basic Energy cards. Show them to your opponent and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Max Elixir
rules: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach a basic Energy card you find there to a Basic Pokémon on your Bench. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Exploud

attacks.name: Destructive Sound
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Discard all Item cards you find there.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.text: Does 50 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

flavorText: Its howls can be heard over six miles away. It emits all sorts of noises from the ports on its body.

name: Crabominable

attacks.name: Fight Alone
attacks.text: If you have fewer Pokémon in play than your opponent, this attack does 50 more damage for each Pokémon fewer you have in play.

flavorText: It stores coldness in its pincers and pummels its foes. It can even smash thick walls of ice to bits!

name: Tyranitar ex δ
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Electromark
attacks.text: Put a Shock-wave marker on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hyper Claws
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon, this attack does 70 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Shock-wave
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Shock-wave markers on it. That Pokémon is Knocked Out.

name: Pineco

attacks.name: Selfdestruct
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Pineco does 50 damage to itself.

flavorText: It looks just like a pinecone. Its shell protects it from bird Pokémon that peck it by mistake.

name: Surfing Pikachu
flavorText: One summer, a group of Pikachu was found riding the waves at the local beach.

name: Gyarados

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.text: If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, Gyarados does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: They say that during past strife, Gyarados would appear and leave blazing ruins in its wake.

name: Misty's Determination
rules: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, look at the top 8 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Heracross

attacks.name: Turn the Tables
attacks.text: If 1 of your opponent's Pokémon used a GX attack during their last turn, your opponent shuffles their Active Pokémon and all cards attached to it into their deck.

flavorText: It's proud of its thick horn. In Alola, its biggest rival is Vikavolt, which it's always fighting with.

attacks.name: Super Psywave
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Count the amount of Energy attached to that Pokémon. Put that many damage counters on the Pokémon.

name: Bouffalant

abilities.name: Bouffer
abilities.text: Any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Gold Breaker
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a trail.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Kricketot
flavorText: Its legs are short. Whenever it stumbles, its stiff antennae clack with a xylophone-like sound.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy card attached to Cyndaquil.

name: Koffing
flavorText: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

name: Bouffalant

attacks.name: Bouffant Head
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Knock Over
attacks.text: You may discard any Stadium card in play.

flavorText: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.

name: Krokorok

attacks.name: Dredge Up
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It buries some of its prey in the sand to use as emergency meals when its hunts are unsuccessful.

name: Serperior

abilities.name: Royal Garden
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Grass Energy attached to it, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

flavorText: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior's noble eyes.

name: Pokédex
rules: Look at up to 5 cards from the top of your deck and rearrange them as you like.

name: Krookodile

attacks.name: Dredge Up
attacks.text: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Tantrum
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It conceals itself in sandstorms that Flygon whip up and waits patiently for prey to appear.

name: Metagross ★
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Critical Collection
attacks.text: Count the number of Prize cards your opponent has taken. Search your discard pile for up to that many Metal Energy cards and attach them to Metagross Star.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Galarian Weezing

abilities.name: Neutralizing Gas
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent's Pokémon in play have no Abilities, except for Neutralizing Gas.

attacks.name: Severe Poison
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 4 damage counters instead of 1 on that Pokémon during Pokémon Checkup.

flavorText: This Pokémon consumes particles that contaminate the air. Instead of leaving droppings, it expels clean air.

name: Ash's Pikachu

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: This form of Pikachu is somewhat rare. It wears the hat of its Trainer, who is also its partner.

name: Tornadus-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Windfall
attacks.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Jet Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Recycle Energy
rules: Recycle Energy provides Colorless Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)
If this card is put into your discard pile from play, return it to your hand.

name: Dratini

abilities.name: Defensive Scales
abilities.text: Prevent all effects of your opponent's attacks, except damage, done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It's still weak, so it lurks on the floor of bodies of water, eating whatever food sinks down and living a quiet life.

name: Noibat

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: They live in pitch black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.

name: Groudon

attacks.name: Drought
attacks.text: Attach up to 2 Fighting Energy cards from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Trembling Ground
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Trembling Ground during your next turn.

flavorText: Said to have expanded the lands by evaporating water with raging heat. It battled titanically with Kyogre.

name: Volcanion-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Steam Up
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Fire Energy card from your hand. If you do, during this turn, your Basic Fire Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Volcanic Heat
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

abilities.name: Fan Shift
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Fan Rotom's type is Colorless until the end of your turn.

attacks.name: Spin Storm
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent returns the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to his or her hand.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy attached to Fan Rotom.

name: Target Whistle Team Flare Gear
rules: Put a Basic Pokémon from your opponent's discard pile onto his or her Bench.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Darkrai

abilities.name: Darkness Guard
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has any Darkness Energy attached, it takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Vortex of Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: Beast Ring
rules: You can play this card only if your opponent has exactly 3 or 4 Prize cards remaining.
Search your deck for up to 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Ultra Beasts. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Energy Flow
rules: For each of your Pokémon, you may return any number of Energy cards attached to it to your hand.

attacks.name: Fastball
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Charge Beam
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to Voltorb.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Master Ball
rules: Look at 7 cards from the top of your deck. You may choose a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card from those cards, show it to your opponent, then put it into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Fan Rotom

abilities.name: Roto Motor
abilities.text: If you have 9 or more Pokémon Tool cards in your discard pile, ignore all Energy in the attack cost of each of this Pokémon's attacks.

attacks.name: Spinning Fan
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

name: Swablu

attacks.name: Bind Wound
attacks.text: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: Wings and beaks. I like yours, and I like mine, too.

name: Max Potion
rules: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, discard all Energy attached to that Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Power Memory
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
The Zygarde-EX this card is attached to can also use the attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: All Cells Burn
attacks.text: Discard 3 Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: ナッシー[Exeggutor]

attacks.name: ふみつけ[Stomp]
attacks.text: コインを1回投げオモテなら、10ダメージを追加。 Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Dr.オーヤマ考案「日米交流カード」パーティ気分で和洋せっちゅう。

name: Winona
rules: Search your deck for up to 3 Colorless Pokémon and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Professor Rowan
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Choose 1 card in your hand and shuffle the rest of your cards into your deck. Then, draw 4 cards. (If this is the only card in your hand, you can't play this card.)

name: Shining Raichu
rules: You can't have more than 1 Shining Raichu in your deck.

attacks.name: Thundersquall
attacks.text: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon for each Water Energy attached to Shining Raichu. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: If the electricity in its cheeks runs out, it sticks its tail straight up and uses it to collect energy from the air.

name: Evosoda
rules: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Gyarados-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Draconic Disaster
attacks.text: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 100 more damage. Then, discard that Stadium card.

attacks.name: Dread Storm-GX
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from each of your opponent's Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Poké Ball
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Raikou ★
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Lightning Turn
attacks.text: Switch Raikou Star with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Meta Voltage
attacks.text: If you have less Prize cards left than your opponent, this attack does 40 damage to each of your Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Patrat

attacks.name: Patrol
attacks.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back on top of your deck in any order.

flavorText: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won't notice a foe coming from behind.

name: Lugia-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Overflow
abilities.text: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack of this Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Plasma Gale
attacks.text: Discard a Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you can't discard a Plasma Energy, this attack does nothing.

name: Kyogre-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Smash Turn
attacks.text: You may switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dual Splash
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Totodile

attacks.name: Shining Fang
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

flavorText: It has the habit of biting anything with its developed jaws. Even its Trainer need to be careful.

name: Charizard ★ δ
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Rotating Claws
attacks.text: You may discard an Energy card attached to Charizard Star. If you do, search your discard pile for an Energy card (excluding the one you discarded) and attach it to Charizard Star.

attacks.name: Dark Swirl
attacks.text: Discard all Energy cards attached to Charizard Star and discard the top 3 cards from your opponent's deck.

name: Venusaur ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Energy Trans
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), move a Grass Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Venusaur ex is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Pollen Hazard
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned, Burned, and Confused.

name: Breloom

attacks.name: Spore
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Pre-Dawn Strike
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: Its short arms stretch when it throws punches. Its technique is equal to that of pro boxers.

attacks.name: Evil Eye
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Put a damage counter on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blindside
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has a damage counter on it. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

name: Sudowoodo

attacks.name: Reply Strongly
attacks.text: If this Pokémon was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn while it was your Active Pokémon, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavorText: Apparently, the larger the green parts of this Pokémon, the more collectors value it. It's a particular favorite among elderly people.

name: Alph Lithograph
rules: Look at your opponent's hand!

name: Stakataka

abilities.name: Wall of Stone
abilities.text: If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this Pokémon's maximum HP is 200.

attacks.name: Top Down
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.

name: Bill
rules: Draw 2 cards.

name: Training Center
rules: Each Stage 1 and Stage 2 Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets +30 HP.
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Magikarp

attacks.name: Flail Around
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: A Magikarp living for many years can leap a mountain using Splash. The move remains useless, though.

name: Grapploct

attacks.name: Octolock
attacks.text: Until this Grapploct leaves the Active Spot, the Defending Pokémon's attacks cost ColorlessColorless more, and the Defending Pokémon can't retreat. This effect can't be applied more than once.

attacks.name: Tough Swing
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

name: Wingull
flavorText: Fishermen keep an eye out for Wingull in the sky, because wherever they're circling, the ocean is sure to be teeming with fish Pokémon.

name: Here Comes Team Rocket!
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Each player plays with his or her Prize cards face up for the rest of the game.

name: Stufful
flavorText: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

name: Gumshoos-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Search the Premises
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent reveal their hand.

attacks.name: Gumshoe Chance-GX
attacks.text: This attack does 50 damage times the amount of Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Zekrom

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.text: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 40 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. In its tail, it has a giant generator that creates electricity.

name: Bunnelby

ancientTrait.name: Ω Barrage
ancientTrait.text: This Pokémon may attack twice a turn. (If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, you may attack again after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Burrow
attacks.text: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Rototiller
attacks.text: Shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.

flavorText: It has ears like shovels. Digging holes strengthens its ears so much that they can sever thick roots effortlessly.

name: Axew

attacks.name: Extra Chop
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: They mark their territory by leaving gashes in trees with their tusks. If a tusk breaks, a new one grows in quickly.

name: Mewtwo-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Shatter Shot
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage times the amount of Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Damage Change
attacks.text: Switch all damage counters on this Pokémon with those on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Poliwag

attacks.name: Twiddle
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: Its skin is so thin, its internal organs are visible. It has trouble walking on its newly grown feet.

name: Dialga LV.X
rules: Put this card onto your Active Dialga. Dialga LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

abilities.name: Time Skip
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, your turn ends. If both of them are tails, after your opponent draws a card at the beginning of his or her next turn, his or her turn ends. This power can't be used if Dialga is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Metal Flash
attacks.text: During your next turn, Dialga can't use Metal Flash.

name: Rufflet

attacks.name: Chirp
attacks.text: Search your deck for 2 Pokémon with Fighting Resistance, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sharp Beak
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

name: PlusPower
rules: Attach PlusPower to 1 of your Pokémon. Discard this card at the end of your turn.
If the Pokémon PlusPower is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Growlithe

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.text: Heal all damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Extremely loyal to its Trainer, it will bark at those who approach the Trainer unexpectedly and run them out of town.

attacks.name: Fury Headbutt
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Dragonair

attacks.name: Twister
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Lakes where Dragonair live are filled with offerings from people, because they believe this Pokémon is able to control the weather.

name: Misty's Determination
rules: Discard a card from your hand. If you do, look at the top 8 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Ash's Pikachu

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Volt Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: This form of Pikachu is somewhat rare. It wears the hat of its Trainer, who is also its partner.

name: Poliwhirl

attacks.name: Bubblebeam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The spiral pattern on its belly subtly undulates. Staring at it gradually causes drowsiness.

name: Vulpix

attacks.name: Fire Soul
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It controls balls of fire. As it grows, its six tails split from their tips to make more tails.

name: Altaria

attacks.name: Fairy Friend
attacks.text: If you have any Fairy Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: This fluffiness makes everyone go crazy. Is it really that charming?

name: Acro Bike
rules: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Discard the other card.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Magnemite

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: The faster the units at its sides rotate, the greater the magnetic force they generate.

name: Rival
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Your opponent chooses 3 of those cards. Put those cards into your hand and put other 2 cards on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Misty's Duel
rules: You and your opponent play a game of Rock-Paper-Scissors. The winner shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck and draws a new hand of 5 cards. (If you don't know how to play Rock-Paper-Scissors, flip a coin to decide who's the winner.)

name: Professor Oak's Visit
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Draw 3 cards. Then, choose a card from your hand and put it on the bottom of your deck.

name: Drilbur

attacks.name: Rototiller
attacks.text: Shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.

flavorText: It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed.

name: Palkia LV.X
rules: Put this card onto your Active Palkia. Palkia LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

abilities.name: Restructure
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, you switch 1 of the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This power can't be used if Palkia is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Hydro Reflect
attacks.text: You may move all Energy cards attached to Palkia to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. (Ignore this effect if you don't have any Benched Pokémon.)

name: Stunky

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: From its rear, it sprays a foul-smelling liquid at opponents. It aims for their faces, and it can hit them from over 16 feet away.

name: Bonnie
rules: You can play this card only if there is any Stadium card in play.
Discard that Stadium card. During this turn, your Zygarde-GX can use its GX attack even if you have used your GX attack.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Shaymin

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: The blooming of Gracidea flowers confers the power of flight upon it. Feelings of gratitude are the message it delivers.

name: Herbal Energy
rules: This card can only be attached to Grass Pokémon. This card provides Grass Energy only while this card is attached to a Grass Pokémon.
When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Grass Pokémon, heal 30 damage from that Pokémon.
(If this card is attached to anything other than a Grass Pokémon, discard this card.)

name: Greninja & Zoroark-GX
rules: TAG TEAM rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Dark Pulse
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage times the amount of Darkness Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dark Union-GX
attacks.text: Put 2 in any combination of Darkness Pokémon-GX and Darkness Pokémon-EX from your discard pile onto your Bench. If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), attach 2 Energy cards from your discard pile to each Pokémon that you put onto your Bench in this way. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Max Revive
rules: Discard 2 Energy cards from your hand in order to put 1 Basic Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench. (You can't play Max Revive if your Bench is full.)

name: Raikou-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Volt Bolt
attacks.text: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness or Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Mysterious Fossil
rules: Play Mysterious Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Mysterious Fossil counts as a Pokémon (instead of a Trainer card). Mysterious Fossil has no attacks, can't retreat, and can't be affected by Special Conditions. If Mysterious Fossil is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Mysterious Fossil from play. You can put Pokémon that evolve from Mysterious Fossil on this card.

name: Bewear

abilities.name: Rake It In
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Dangerous Blow
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.

name: Gardevoir-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Link Blast
attacks.text: If this Pokémon and your opponent's Active Pokémon have the same amount of Energy attached to them, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Luminous Blade
attacks.text: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Charmander.

name: Mew ★ δ
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Mimicry
attacks.text: Choose an attack on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon in play. Mimicry copies that attack. This attack does nothing if Mew Star doesn't have the Energy necessary to use that attack. (You must still do anything else required for that attack.) Mew Star performs that attack.

attacks.name: Rainbow Wave
attacks.text: Choose 1 basic Energy card attached to Mew Star. This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon that is the same type as the basic Energy card that you chose. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Frost Shift
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Frost Rotom's type is Water until the end of your turn.

attacks.name: Hail
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Crushing Ice
attacks.text: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Colorless Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost (after applying effects to the Retreat Cost).

name: Trubbish

attacks.name: Lucky Find
attacks.text: Search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Its favorite places are unsanitary ones. If you leave trash lying around, you could even find one of these Pokémon living in your room.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: Any damage done to Azumarill by attacks from Fire Pokémon and Water Pokémon is reduced by 30 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Bubblebeam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Suicune ★
rules: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

attacks.name: Splashing Turn
attacks.text: Switch Suicune Star with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Cross Wind
attacks.text: If you have less Prize cards left than your opponent, discard all Energy cards attached to all of your Pokémon.

name: Ghetsis
rules: Your opponent reveals his or her hand and shuffles all Item cards found there into his or her deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of Item cards your opponent shuffled into his or her deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Phanpy

attacks.name: Last Resort
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It is strong despite its compact size. It can easily pick up and carry an adult human on its back.

name: Stonjourner

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun's descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

name: Stufful

attacks.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

name: Misty's Tears
rules: Discard 1 of the other cards in your hand in order to search your deck for up to 2 Water Energy cards. Show those cards to your opponent, then put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Dragon Smash
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Dragonite

abilities.name: Fast Call
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It flies over raging seas as if they were nothing. Observing this, a ship's captain dubbed this Pokémon "the sea incarnate."

name: Watchog

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Psych Up
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Psych Up attack does 30 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

name: Professor Juniper
rules: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Murkrow

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.text: Choose a random card from your opponent's hand. Your opponent reveals that card and shuffles it into their deck.

flavorText: It has a weakness for shiny things. It's been known to sneak into the nests of Gabite—noted collectors of jewels—in search of treasure.

name: Strong Energy
rules: This card can only be attached to Fighting Pokémon. This card provides Fighting Energy only while this card is attached to a Fighting Pokémon.
The attacks of the Fighting Pokémon this card is attached to do 20 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
(If this card is attached to anything other than a Fighting Pokémon, discard this card.)

name: Professor Rowan
rules: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.
Choose 1 card in your hand and shuffle the rest of your cards into your deck. Then, draw 4 cards. (If this is the only card in your hand, you can't play this card.)

name: Skitty

attacks.name: Triple Slap
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It shows its cute side by chasing its own tail until it gets dizzy.

name: Zubat

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Even though it has no eyes, it can sense obstacles using ultrasonic waves it emits from its mouth.

attacks.name: Foresight
attacks.text: Look at the top 3 cards of either player's deck and rearrange them as you like.

attacks.name: Removal Beam
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of those Energy cards and discard it.

name: Alolan Golem-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Super Electromagnetic Tackle
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 50 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Heavy Rock-GX
attacks.text: Your opponent can't play any cards from their hand during their next turn. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Stufful
flavorText: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

name: Stonjourner V
rules: V rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Donphan

abilities.name: Sturdy
abilities.text: If this Pokémon has full HP and would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, this Pokémon is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.

attacks.name: Rolling Spin
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Rolling Spin attack does 70 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take long to grow.

name: Skuntank

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: In its belly, it reserves stinky fluid that it shoots from its tail during battle. As this Pokémon's diet varies, so does the stench of its fluid.

name: Mankey

attacks.name: Extra Punch
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon LV.X, this attack does 10 damage plus 50 more damage.

flavorText: It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.

name: Articuno ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Legendary Ascent
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you put Articuno ex from your hand onto your Bench, you may switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with Articuno ex. If you do, you may also move any number of basic Water Energy cards attached to your Pokémon to Articuno ex.

attacks.name: Cold Crush
attacks.text: You may discard an Energy card attached to Articuno ex. If you do, your opponent discards an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Baby Outing
attacks.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck, and then choose 1 of those cards and put it into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck afterward.

name: Purrloin

attacks.name: Fake Out
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It steals things from people just to amuse itself with their frustration. A rivalry exists between this Pokémon and Nickit.

name: Ash's Pikachu

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: This form of Pikachu is somewhat rare. It wears the hat of its Trainer, who is also its partner.

name: Pelipper

attacks.name: Firefighting
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: Gathering food is the work of young males. They store food in their capacious beaks and carry it back to others waiting in the nest.

abilities.name: Heat Shift
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Heat Rotom's type is Fire until the end of your turn.

attacks.name: Warm Up
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Heat Burn
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Meditite

attacks.name: Spirited Headbutt
attacks.text: This Pokémon can't use Spirited Headbutt during your next turn.

flavorText: It always trains deep in mountains. It levitates when it heightens its spiritual power through meditation.

name: Machamp-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Crazy Hammer
attacks.text: If this Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 80 more damage. Then, remove all Special Conditions from this Pokémon.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Energize
attacks.text: Attach a Lightning Energy from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.text: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This is an extremely rare Pikachu card. You're very lucky to have found it!

name: Komala

abilities.name: Comatose
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, whenever you attach an Energy from your hand to it, it is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Hypno Roll
attacks.text: This attack can be used if this Pokémon is Asleep. If it is not Asleep, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.

name: Random Receiver
rules: Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Supporter card. Put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Braviary

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

name: Fletchling

attacks.name: Warble
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Fletchling, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Little friends, thanks for always helping me look so cute!

name: Poochyena

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: A Pokémon with a persistent nature, it chases its chosen prey until the prey becomes exhausted.

name: Flying Pikachu

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: By learning how to fly, Pikachu overcame its weakness to Fighting Pokémon.

name: Pokémon Catcher
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Narrow Gym
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play.

No player may have more than 4 Pokémon on his or her Bench. When this card is played, if a player has 5 Pokémon on his or her Bench, that player chooses 1 of them and returns it and all cards attached to it to his or her hand. (If both players have to return a Pokémon, your opponent returns a Pokémon first.)

name: Tierno
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Rocket's Persian ex
rules: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Night Cry
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if Rocket's Persian ex is on your Bench, you may search your deck for a Pokémon with Dark or Rocket's in its name. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Toxic Claws
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 2 damage counters instead of 1 on the Defending Pokémon between turns.

name: Torchic
flavorText: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees F.

name: Shining Steelix
rules: You can't have more than 1 Shining Steelix in your deck.

attacks.name: Crushing Earth
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If tails, this attack does nothing. Either way, Shining Steelix can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: If an Onix lives 100 years or more, its skin hardens, eventually becoming even harder than a diamond.

name: Fairy Garden
rules: Each Pokémon that has any Fairy Energy attached to it (both yours and your opponent's) has no Retreat Cost.
This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

name: Fraxure

attacks.name: Dragon Slayer
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Dragon Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: A broken tusk will not grow back, so it diligently sharpens its tusks on river rocks after the end of a battle.

name: Garbodor

attacks.name: Trash Cyclone
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Pokémon Tool card in your discard pile. Then, shuffle those cards into your deck.

attacks.name: Poison Spray
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: This Pokémon eats trash, which turns into poison inside its body. The main component of the poison depends on what sort of trash was eaten.

name: Crasher Wake
rules: Discard 2 Water Energy cards from your hand. If you do, search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Excadrill

attacks.name: Eleventh Hour Tackle
attacks.text: If there are 3 or fewer cards in your deck, this attack does 150 more damage.

attacks.name: Drill Bazooka
attacks.text: Discard the top 4 cards of your deck.

flavorText: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.

name: Aggron Spirit Link
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.
Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Aggron-EX.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Potion
rules: Remove up to 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Yungoos

attacks.name: Scout
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals their hand.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It wanders around in a never-ending search for food. At dusk, it collapses from exhaustion and falls asleep on the spot.

name: Professor Oak
rules: Discard your hand, then draw 7 cards.

name: Energy Switch
rules: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Bewear

attacks.name: Mix-Up
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Tantrum
attacks.text: This Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.

name: Groudon-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Tromp
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Giant Claw
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon already has 2 or more damage counters on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Pokédex HANDY910is
rules: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Put the other card on the bottom of your deck.

name: Speed Stadium
rules: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.
Once during each player's turn, the player may flip a coin until he or she gets tails. For each heads, that player draws a card.

name: Drampa-GX
rules: Pokémon-GX rule: When your Pokémon-GX is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Righteous Edge
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Berserk
attacks.text: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Big Wheel-GX
attacks.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 10 cards. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Riolu
flavorText: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

name: Archie's Ace in the Hole
rules: You can play this card only when it is the last card in your hand.
Put a Water Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench. Then, draw 5 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Trick Coin
rules: Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

Once during your turn, after you flip any coins for an attack of the Pokémon this card is attached to, you may ignore all effects of those coin flips and begin flipping those coins again. (You may only use effects that let you flip coins again, including effects from other cards, once during your turn.)
You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

name: Diantha
rules: You can play this card only if 1 of your Fairy Pokémon was Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.
Put 2 cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

name: Eevee & Snorlax-GX
rules: TAG TEAM rule: When your TAG TEAM is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Cheer Up
attacks.text: Attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dump Truck Press
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, this attack does 120 more damage.

attacks.name: Megaton Friends-GX
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra Energy attached to it (in addition to this attack's cost), draw cards until you have 10 cards in your hand. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)

name: Ash's Pikachu

attacks.name: Iron Tail
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavorText: This form of Pikachu is somewhat rare. It wears the hat of its Trainer, who is also its partner.

name: Pokémon Rescue
rules: Search your discard pile for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand.

name: Meditite

attacks.name: Karate Chop
attacks.text: Does 30 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Meditite.

flavorText: It always trains deep in mountains. It levitates when it heightens its spiritual power through meditation.

name: Spiritomb

attacks.name: Splitting Spite
attacks.text: Discard the top card of each player's deck.

attacks.name: Dripping Grudge
attacks.text: Put 1 damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon for each Pokémon in your discard pile.

flavorText: It was bound to a fissure in an Odd Keystone as punishment for misdeeds 500 years ago.

name: Sabrina's Gaze
rules: Each player shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck and draws a new hand of the same number of cards.

name: Gyarados

name: Super Potion
rules: Discard 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your own Pokémon in order to remove up to 4 damage counters from that Pokémon.

name: Rocket's Minefield Gym

Whenever a player puts a Basic Pokémon onto his or her Bench from his or her hand, he or she flips a coin. If tails, put damage counters on that Pokémon.

name: Super Scoop Up
rules: Flip a coin. If heads, return 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

abilities.name: Mow Shift
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Mow Rotom's type is Grass until the end of your turn.

name: Darkrai-EX

name: Shining Tyranitar
rules: You can't have more than 1 Shining Tyranitar in your deck.

attacks.name: Mountain Crush
attacks.text: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, your opponent discards the top card from his or her deck.

attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Fire Energy card attached to Shining Tyranitar. For each heads, discard a Fire Energy card attached to Shining Tyranitar or this attack does nothing. Then, for each heads, choose an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon and discard it. If it has fewer Energy cards than that, remove all of them.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard 1 card from your hand. Then, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Attack Command
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's).

name: Bewear

attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.text: You may do 40 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Heracross-EX
rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Deino

name: Nihilego-GX

rules: Put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.
